rulings.Case Title: ROBERT DAVIDSON VS. ALLIED PACKING et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 15, 2009, line 1, DEFENDANT AMCHEM PRODUCTS INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Matter transferred to Department 301 to be heard on same day. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MILES MCNAUGHT VS. AEG LIVE, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Aeg Live, Llc And Anschutz 12k Company Motion For Summary Judgment/Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 15, 2009, line 10, Defendant AEG Live, LLC and Anschutz 12K Company motion for summary judgment/summary adjudication. Motion for Summary Judgment granted as to defendants AEG and Anschutz. Labor Code section 3602(d) bars claim against AEG. Lack of active participation and having only general control of the race is insufficient to create liability as to Anschulz. See Hooker vs. Department of Transportation (2002) 27 Cal. 4th 198. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: MILES MCNAUGHT VS. AEG LIVE, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant The Howard Company, Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 15, 2009, line 10, Defendant The Howard Company Motion for Summary Judgment. Motion for summary judgment as to defendant The Howard Company is denied. Triable issue of fact raised whether Dwight acted as Howard's agent/employee and breached his duty to provide a safe environment. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF NEW YORK AS TRUSTEE FOR THE VS. KHALID TURNER et al
